name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Windows Spooler Service File Deletion
notes:
This Building Block detect DLL deletions from Spooler Service driver folder.
Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Bhabesh Raj
SIGMA Title: Windows Spooler Service Suspicious File Deletion
SIGMA Description: Detect DLL deletions from Spooler Service driver folder


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Windows Spooler Service File Deletion on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Deleted
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of spoolsv.exe
when the event matches LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '%c:\windows\system32\spool\drivers\x64\3\%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Windows Spooler Service File Deletion on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Deleted
AND when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of spoolsv.exe
AND when the event matches LOWER("File Directory") LIKE '%c:\windows\system32\spool\drivers\x64\3\%' AQL filter query
